markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Lit

A curated list of awesome Lit resources.

Litstars7.7k — a simple library for building fast, lightweight web components.

At its core is a boilerplate-killing component base class that provides reactive state, scoped styles, and a declarative template system that leads the pack in size, speed, and expressiveness.

General resources

  • Documentation
  • GitHub repositorystars7.7k

Community

  • lit-html Twitter
  • Slack Channel

Overview

  • Lightning-fast templates & Web Components: lit-html & LitElement

Implementations

Sorted by creation date (oldest first).

  • lit-element - Simple base class for creating fast, lightweight Web Components.
  • @gluon/gluon - Lightweight library for building Web Components and applications.
  • @lit-any/corestars0 - Partials library, which uses lit-html to compose views and forms from smaller templates.
  • lit-html-element - Base class for creating Web Components using lit-html.
  • fit-html - Combination of lit-html, Web Components and Redux.
  • lit-html-brackets - A lit-html extension that uses a bracket syntax similar to Angular's template syntax.
  • @littleq/element-lite - A take on using lit-html and Polymer's property mixin.
  • @popeindustries/lit-html-server - Render lit-html templates on the server as Node.js streams.
  • ullrstars41 - Building Web Components with Functional Programming Using lit-html.
  • ce-decorators - TypeScript library for building Web Components based on decorators proposal and lit-html.
  • @appnest/lit-translate - Lightweight i18n library providing a lit-html directive.
  • haunted - React's Hooks API but for standard web components and hyperHTML or lit-html.
  • fuco - Functional component like React, but for Web Components.
  • lit-upstars17 - Minimal yet scalable state pattern for reactive web apps with lit-html templates
  • lit-appstars31 - Isomorphic lit-html based context for front-end apps, server-side rendering and static sites
  • perlitestars24 - Declarative way to create rich client-side widgets designed with server-side apps in mind.

Renderers

The following libraries allow using lit-html as a renderer, while also providing alternatives such as HyperHTMLstars2.8k or JSX.

  • @corpuscule/lit-html-renderer - lit-html based renderer for Corpusculestars28.
  • @helikopter/render-lit-html - lit-html based renderer for Helicopterstars27.
  • @moleculejs/molecule-lit - lit-html based renderer for Moleculestars39.
  • @skatejs/element-lit-html - lit-html based renderer for SkateJSstars3.2k.
  • icomponent-lit - lit-html based renderer for icomponentstars27.

LitElement Extensions

These are not implementations of lit-html itself but rather community extensions of the official LitElement base class.

  • @adobe/lit-mobx - Mixin and base class for using mobx with LitElement.
  • @apollo-elements/lit-apollo - LitElement integrations with Apollo GraphQL.
  • @collaborne/lit-flexbox-literals - Provides LitElement CSS literals & classes ported from @polymer/iron-flex-layoutstars88.
  • @morbidick/lit-element-notify - Small mixin for LitElement to get easy change events via the properties getter.
  • fluent-localize-mixin - LitElement extension that provides easy l10n out of the box.
  • haunted-lit-element - A missing connection between Haunted and LitElement.
  • lit-robot - LitElement integration with Robot.
  • lit-element-state - Simple shared app state management for LitElement.
  • nextbone - Backbone re-imagined with ES classes and decorators for using with LitElement.
  • wc-context - A context implementation for web components with LitElement integration.
  • lit-element-state-decoupler - Utility for state handling outside of the component for LitElement.

Other

  • @feature-hub/dom - Library for building a Feature Hubstars102 integrator using Web Components.

Components

Component Libraries

  • Amber Componentsstars22 - Web Components implementation of the Amber Design System.
  • AXA Pattern Librarystars65 - AXA CH UI components library built with LitElement.
  • Belle UIstars35 - High quality UI library based on LitElement.
  • Blackstone UIstars17 - Web components for creating interfaces built with lit-html and LitElement.
  • Brightspace UI corestars17 - Collection of web components for building Brightspace applications.
  • Bronconentsstars6 - Modern Web Components built with Lit-Element.
  • Carbon Custom Elementsstars187 - Experimental variant of Carbon Design System built with Web Components.
  • Chameleon Web Componentsstars23 - Collection of framework-agnostic elements based on the Chameleon Design System.
  • Chartjs Web Componentsstars42 - Web components for chartjs.
  • Clever componentsstars80 - Collection of Web Components made by Clever Cloud.
  • Iooxastars83 - Web components for interactive scientific writing, reactive documents and explorable explanations.
  • Korstars119 - User Interface Component Library based on LitElement.
  • Lionstars1.1k - Highly performant, accessible and flexible Web Components.
  • Lithium UIstars11 - Lightweight UI Components that work everywhere.
  • LRNWebComponentsstars170 - ELMS:LN produced web components for any project.
  • Material Web Componentsstars2.5k - Material Design implemented as Web Components.
  • Microsoft Graph Toolkitstars545 - Collection of web components for the Microsoft Graph.
  • Mutation testing elementsstars12 - A schema for mutation testing results with the web components to visualize it.
  • Spectrum Web Componentsstars349 - Adobe Spectrum design language implementation built with LitElement.
  • UI5 Web Componentsstars917 - Enterprise-flavored sugar on top of native APIs!
  • VSCode-Webview-Elementsstars9 - Components for creating VSCode extensions which use the Webview API.
  • Weightlessstars293 - High quality web components with a small footprint.
  • Wired Elementsstars8.6k - Collection of elements that appear hand drawn.
  • Wokwi Elementsstars34 - Web Components for Arduino and various electronic parts.

Individual Components

  • <api-viewer> - API documentation and live playground for Web Components.
  • <app-datepicker> - Datepicker element built with LitElement and Material Design 2.
  • <burgton-button> - Simple to use, customizable and accessible burger-button element.
  • <code-block> - Web component that displays colorfully formatted code with Prism.js and LitElement.
  • <codesandbox-button> - Custom Element that shows a CodeSandbox demo when you click on it.
  • <dile-modal> - Web Component to implement a modal box, based on LitElement.
  • <erd-editor> - ERD Editor element database modeling tool built with LitElement
  • <granite-qrcode-generator> - Custom element to generate and render QR Codes, using qr.js library.
  • <lit-datatable> - Material Design implementation of a data table, powered by LitElement.
  • <lottie-player> - Web Component for easily embedding and playing Lottie animations.
  • <model-viewer> - A web component for rendering interactive 3D models.
  • <rapi-doc> - Web Component to view OpenAPI 3.0 & Swagger 2.0 Spec.
  • <stl-part-viewer> - LitElement web component that utilizes Three.js to display an STL model file.

Starter Templates

  • open-wc-starter-appstars84 - Starter app based on Open Web Components Recommendations.
  • generator-lit-element-nextstars16 - Generator for developing your next custom element with latest LitElement in TypeScript.
  • pwa-starterstars363 - LitElement edition of the PWABuilder pwa-starter.
  • @rxdi/starter-client-lit-htmlstars7 - Client side application build with @rxdi, lit-html, GraphQL, dependency injection.

IDE Plugins

  • vscode-lit-htmlstars257 - Syntax highlighting and IntelliSense for lit-html template strings.
  • vscode-lit-plugin - Syntax highlighting, type checking and code completion for lit-html.
  • es6-string-htmlstars59 - VSCode extension which provides syntax highlighting for HTML in ES6 multiline strings.
  • vim-html-template-literalsstars49 - Syntax highlighting and indentation for lit-html.
  • lit-web-components-vscode-extension-packstars0 - A set of VS Code extensions useful for developing LitElement Web Components.

TypeScript Plugins

  • ts-lit-plugin - Plugin that adds type checking and code completion for lit-html. Used by vscode-lit-plugin.
  • typescript-lit-html-pluginstars209 - TypeScript server plugin that adds IntelliSense for lit-html. Used by vscode-lit-html.

Tools

  • babel-plugin-template-html-minifierstars59 - Babel plugin for minifying HTML in tagged template strings.
  • eslint-plugin-litstars59 - ESLint plugin for lit-html template strings.
  • eslint-plugin-lit-a11y - Accessibility linting plugin for lit-html
  • lit-analyzer - CLI that type checks bindings in lit-html templates.
  • rollup-plugin-minify-html-literalsstars41 - Rollup plugin to minify HTML in tagged template strings.
  • rollup-plugin-inline-lit-elementstars11 - Rollup plugin to inline external styles in LitElement and transpile decorators.
  • rollup-plugin-lit-cssstars32 - Rollup plugin to import CSS files as LitElement tagged css template strings.
  • rollup-plugin-postcss-litstars9 - Rollup plugin to load PostCSS-processed stylesheets in LitElement components.
  • lit-loaderstars91 - LitElement Single File Component loader for Webpack.
  • Nutmegstars112 - CLI tool to build, test, and publish vanilla Web Components with a little spice.
  • open-wc - Set of recommendations to help you generate, test, lint, demo, and publish Web Components.
  • web-components-codemodsstars4 - Codemods for Web Components compatible with lit-html template literals.

CDN

The following content delivery networks provide ES module versions of lit-html and LitElement:

  • unpkg.com
    • lit-html
    • lit-element
  • Pika CDN
    • lit-html
    • lit-element

Note on using CDN

  1. lit-html directives might not work with LitElement when using Pika CDN.
  2. See this issue where the static build for CDN distribution is discussed.

Static Site Generators

  • Greenwoodstars25 - Modern and performant static site generator supporting Web Components based development.
  • Hydrogenstars83 - Static-site generator built with TypeScript, which uses templating inspired by lit-html.

Examples

  • lit-demosstars89 - Examples for using the lit-html library and LitElement base class.
  • lit-html workshopstars82

Videos

  • Efficient, Expressive, and Extensible HTML Templates (Polymer Summit 2017)
  • lit-HTML (Chrome Dev Summit 2017)
  • VDOM vs lit-html - HTTP203
  • Declarative Reactive Web Components with Justin Fagnani
  • Building a Complex Application with Web Components and LitElement

Podcasts

  • The Web Platform Podcast 159: lit-html - HTML Templates via JavaScript Template Literals -

An episode with the lit-html creator Justin Fagnani.

  • ShopTalk Show 348: Getting lit-html with Justin Fagnani - Another episode with Justin Fagnani as a guest.

Projects

Create Social Images https://createsocialimages.com Source

Inspired Solutions

These libraries do not depend on lit-html, but are inspired by some of its concepts. They use html tagged template literal, and leverage the benefits of the same IDE Plugins for syntax highlighting.

  • htmstars6.7k - Hyperscript Tagged Markup: JSX alternative using standard tagged templates, with compiler support.
  • hybridsstars2.3k - UI library for creating Web Components with simple and functional API.
  • lit-ntmlstars69 - Lightweight and modern templating for SSR in Node.js, inspired by lit-html.
  • lite-htmlstars26 - A modern replacement for VirtualDOM rendering engines.
  • modulor-htmlstars35 - Missing template engine for Web Components.
  • nanohtmlstars652 - HTML template strings for the browser with support for Server Side Rendering in Node.
  • picohtmlstars13 - Powerfully ~2kB (gzip) HTML template strings.
  • tiny-litstars17 - Library for building user interfaces using template literals.

Other awesome resources

If you want more awesome resources, check the awesomestars164.8k list!
